name: Surya Prakash B S
body: Surya Prakash is Fellow and Programme Director at DAKSH, where he has spent a decade leading the Rule of Law Project, using quantitative research to map case pendency and the administration of justice in India. A chartered accountant and lawyer by background, he previously led tax controversy work at IBM across Asia-Pacific. DAKSH's data work is foundational to how PUCAR measures court performance.
